name: Cheesey Hot Clam Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a medium skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add onion and celery to the skillet.
3. Saute until onions are tender.
4. Reduce heat to low.
5. Add remaining ingredients to the skillet.
6. Continue cooking, stirring constantly, until cheese is melted.
7. Serve with crackers. Makes 1 1/2 cups.
